title: pithecellobium langlassei
intro: Pithecellobium langlassei, also known as the Langlasse's wingleaf tree, is a species of legume native to the Philippines. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pithecellobium langlassei include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve boiling its leaves or bark to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
